description_public: A polygenic estimate related to folate metabolism tendency variation in the general population.

CC.notes: This genotype is associated with typical MTHFR enzyme activity, so folate processing is generally similar to the population average. Diet and overall health still matter more than genetics alone.

CT.notes: This genotype is associated with moderately reduced MTHFR enzyme activity compared with CC. Some studies link it to slightly higher homocysteine levels, but lifestyle and nutrition play a major role.

TT.notes: This genotype is associated with lower MTHFR enzyme activity and a stronger tendency toward higher homocysteine in some studies. This does not diagnose any condition, but it highlights the importance of adequate folate intake and general cardiovascular health.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Folate metabolism tendency
evidence.quote: This genotype is associated with typical MTHFR enzyme activity, so folate processing is generally similar to the population average. Diet and overall health still matter more than genetics alone.
